title: Cloudflare’s compliant crawler highlights tension – and opportunity – in the emerging AI content market
description: Cloudflare faces tension  in its new role: sitting in the middle between publishers and AI companies while balancing trust, control and monetization.
summary_ko: Cloudflare가 출판사와 AI 기업 사이의 중개 역할을 하면서 신뢰, 통제, 수익화 간의 균형을 맞추는 데 어려움을 겪고 있습니다. 새로운 규제 준수 크롤러를 통해 AI 콘텐츠 시장에서의 기회와 긴장 관계를 동시에 보여주고 있습니다. 이는 AI 콘텐츠 생태계에서 플랫폼의 역할과 책임에 대한 중요한 시사점을 제공합니다.
summary_en: Cloudflare is struggling to balance trust, control, and monetization while serving as an intermediary between publishers and AI companies. The company's new compliant crawler highlights both opportunities and tensions in the emerging AI content market. This demonstrates the complex role platforms play in the AI content ecosystem and their responsibility in managing relationships between content creators and AI firms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 콘텐츠 활용 시 저작권 및 규정 준수 문제를 신중히 고려해야 하며, 신뢰할 수 있는 플랫폼 파트너십이 중요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully consider copyright and compliance issues when leveraging AI content, making trustworthy platform partnerships crucial for sustainable operations.
key_points: Cloudflare acts as intermediary between publishers and AI companies
Balancing trust, control, and monetization presents challenges
Compliant crawler represents both opportunity and tension in AI content market

title: The real winners of March Madness? Brands that move fast on NIL deals
description: Companies across sectors, from footwear to personal care, are racing to sign college basketball players.
summary_ko: March Madness 기간 동안 신발부터 개인용품까지 다양한 분야의 기업들이 대학 농구 선수들과의 NIL 계약 체결에 경쟁적으로 나서고 있습니다. 빠른 의사결정과 실행력을 보인 브랜드들이 이 시기의 진정한 승자가 되고 있습니다. 스포츠 이벤트와 연계된 마케팅 기회를 신속히 활용하는 것이 성공의 핵심입니다.
summary_en: Companies across sectors from footwear to personal care are competitively racing to sign NIL deals with college basketball players during March Madness. Brands demonstrating quick decision-making and execution are emerging as the real winners of this period. Swift utilization of marketing opportunities tied to sporting events has become key to success.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 주요 스포츠 이벤트 기간 동안 민첩한 마케팅 실행력을 갖춰 NIL 계약 등 새로운 마케팅 기회를 선점해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need agile marketing execution capabilities to capitalize on new opportunities like NIL deals during major sporting events.
key_points: Multiple sectors racing to sign college basketball players for NIL deals
Fast-moving brands becoming real winners of March Madness
Quick decision-making crucial for sports marketing opportunities

title: Media Briefing: What to expect at the Digiday Publishing Summit, March 2026 edition
description: Execs from The Atlantic, Arena Group, Bloomberg, Business Insider, The Guardian, New York Post, People Inc., Washington Post, and more, will share their strategies on everything from zero-click audience strategy, to AI licensing deals and RAG readiness, to how they’re embracing creator strategies to help  boost engagement with younger audiences.
summary_ko: Digiday Publishing Summit에서 The Atlantic, Bloomberg, The Guardian 등 주요 미디어 기업들이 참여하여 다양한 전략을 공유할 예정입니다. 제로클릭 오디언스 전략, AI 라이선싱 계약, RAG 준비 등 최신 퍼블리싱 트렌드가 논의됩니다. 젊은 층과의 참여도 향상을 위한 크리에이터 전략 활용 방안도 중요한 주제입니다.
summary_en: The Digiday Publishing Summit will feature executives from major media companies like The Atlantic, Bloomberg, and The Guardian sharing various strategies. Latest publishing trends including zero-click audience strategy, AI licensing deals, and RAG readiness will be discussed. Creator strategy adoption to boost engagement with younger audiences is also a key topic.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 라이선싱과 크리에이터 전략을 통해 젊은 소비자층과의 접점을 강화하고 새로운 콘텐츠 유통 방식에 적응해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should strengthen touchpoints with younger consumers through AI licensing and creator strategies while adapting to new content distribution methods.
key_points: Major media executives sharing strategies at publishing summit
Focus on zero-click audience strategy and AI licensing deals
Creator strategies for younger audience engagement emphasized

title: Brands turn niche news creators into a new earned media engine
description: Brands are shifting earned media strategies to tap niche news creators on social platforms.
summary_ko: 브랜드들이 소셜 플랫폼의 틈새 뉴스 크리에이터들을 새로운 언드 미디어 엔진으로 활용하는 전략으로 전환하고 있습니다. 전통적인 언드 미디어 접근 방식에서 벗어나 특정 분야에 특화된 크리에이터들과 협력하는 추세입니다. 이러한 변화는 더욱 타겟화되고 효과적인 마케팅 결과를 가져오고 있습니다.
summary_en: Brands are shifting their earned media strategies to leverage niche news creators on social platforms as a new earned media engine. This represents a departure from traditional earned media approaches toward collaboration with specialized creators in specific fields. This shift is producing more targeted and effective marketing results.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전통적인 PR보다 틈새 크리에이터들과의 협력을 통해 더 정확한 타게팅과 높은 참여도를 달성할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can achieve more precise targeting and higher engagement through collaboration with niche creators rather than traditional PR approaches.
key_points: Brands shifting to niche news creators for earned media
Move away from traditional earned media strategies
Social platform creators becoming new marketing engines

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Thursday, March 19
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 19.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 3월 19일 목요일 정답을 제공하는 기사입니다. CNET에서 게임 관련 콘텐츠로 분류되어 있습니다. 퍼즐 게임에 대한 일반적인 정보 제공 목적의 콘텐츠입니다.
summary_en: This article provides the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword puzzle for Thursday, March 19. It is categorized as gaming content on CNET. The content serves the general purpose of providing information about puzzle games.
so_what_ko: 일반적인 퍼즐 정답 제공 콘텐츠로 D2C 비즈니스와 직접적인 연관성이 확인되지 않습니다.
so_what_en: This puzzle answer content shows no direct relevance to D2C business implications.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers for March 19
Gaming content category on CNET
General puzzle information service

title: AI Brings Val Kilmer Back to the Big Screen a Year After His Death
description: Kilmer's estate approves plans to use generative AI to resurrect the late actor for a role in the historical drama As Deep As the Grave.
summary_ko: 발 킬머의 유족이 생성형 AI를 활용해 고인의 모습을 재현하여 역사 드라마 영화에 출연시키는 계획을 승인했습니다. AI 기술을 통해 사망한 배우를 디지털로 부활시키는 사례가 실현되고 있습니다. 엔터테인먼트 산업에서 AI 생성 기술의 활용 범위가 확대되고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Val Kilmer's estate has approved plans to use generative AI to recreate the late actor's likeness for a role in the historical drama 'As Deep As the Grave'. This represents a real-world application of AI technology to digitally resurrect deceased performers. The case demonstrates the expanding use of AI generation technology in the entertainment industry.
so_what_ko: 브랜드들은 AI를 활용한 디지털 아바타나 가상 인플루언서 개발을 통해 일관된 브랜드 메시징과 마케팅 연속성을 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Brands can leverage AI-powered digital avatars or virtual influencers to ensure consistent brand messaging and marketing continuity.
key_points: AI technology enables resurrection of deceased actors for film roles
Estate approval required for posthumous digital likeness usage
Generative AI expanding into entertainment production

title: Customers Prefer Apps Over Websites for Wireless and Home Internet Service
description: Easier logins are a key reason customers are happier with apps, according to the J.D. Power study.
summary_ko: J.D. Power 연구에 따르면 고객들이 무선 및 홈 인터넷 서비스에서 웹사이트보다 앱을 선호하는 것으로 나타났습니다. 더 쉬운 로그인 과정이 앱에 대한 고객 만족도가 높은 주요 이유로 확인되었습니다. 모바일 앱의 사용자 경험이 웹사이트 대비 우수하다는 점이 입증되었습니다.
summary_en: According to a J.D. Power study, customers prefer mobile apps over websites for wireless and home internet services. Easier login processes are identified as a key factor driving higher customer satisfaction with apps. The research demonstrates superior user experience of mobile applications compared to websites.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 모바일 앱의 로그인 프로세스를 간소화하고 사용자 경험을 최적화하여 고객 만족도와 리텐션을 향상시켜야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prioritize streamlining mobile app login processes and optimizing user experience to improve customer satisfaction and retention.
key_points: Customers prefer apps over websites for service management
Easier login processes drive app preference
Mobile user experience superior to web platforms

title: New Ecommerce Tools: March 18, 2026
description:
This week: reusable packaging, dropshipping, product feeds, finance, fulfillment platforms, B2C marketing, agentic commerce, and AI-powered contact centers.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: March 18, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 2026년 3월 18일 새로운 이커머스 도구들이 소개되었습니다. 재사용 포장재, 드롭쉬핑, 제품 피드, 금융, 풀필먼트 플랫폼 등 다양한 분야의 솔루션이 포함되었습니다. B2C 마케팅, 에이전트 커머스, AI 기반 컨택센터 등 최신 기술을 활용한 도구들이 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: New ecommerce tools were introduced on March 18, 2026, covering various areas including reusable packaging, dropshipping, and product feeds. The toolkit spans finance, fulfillment platforms, and emerging technologies. B2C marketing, agentic commerce, and AI-powered contact centers represent the latest technological innovations.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기반 컨택센터와 에이전트 커머스 등 최신 도구를 활용하여 고객 서비스와 판매 프로세스를 자동화하고 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage AI-powered contact centers and agentic commerce tools to automate and improve customer service and sales processes.
key_points: Multiple new ecommerce tools launched across various categories
AI-powered contact centers and agentic commerce featured
Focus on fulfillment, finance, and B2C marketing solutions

title: How CRO Drives Ecommerce Longevity
description:
Optimizing for onsite conversions informs ad campaigns, organic search, and email marketing.
The post How CRO Drives Ecommerce Longevity appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 전환율 최적화(CRO)가 이커머스의 장기적 성공을 이끄는 핵심 요소로 부상하고 있습니다. 온사이트 전환 최적화는 광고 캠페인, 오가닉 검색, 이메일 마케팅 전략에 중요한 정보를 제공합니다. CRO는 단순한 웹사이트 개선을 넘어 전체 마케팅 생태계에 영향을 미치는 전략적 도구입니다.
summary_en: Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) is emerging as a key driver of ecommerce longevity and long-term success. Onsite conversion optimization provides crucial insights that inform advertising campaigns, organic search, and email marketing strategies. CRO serves as a strategic tool that impacts the entire marketing ecosystem beyond simple website improvements.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 CRO를 단순한 웹사이트 개선이 아닌 전체 마케팅 전략의 핵심으로 활용하여 모든 채널의 성과를 향상시켜야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage CRO as a core component of their overall marketing strategy rather than just website improvement, to enhance performance across all channels.
key_points: CRO drives long-term ecommerce success
Onsite optimization informs broader marketing strategies
CRO impacts advertising, SEO, and email marketing effectiveness

title: Bloomingdale’s takes share from Saks Global, lifts Macy’s Inc. in Q4
description: “The vendor community has rallied around Bloomingdale's like never before,” Macy’s Inc. CEO Tony Spring told analysts Wednesday.
summary_ko: 블루밍데일스가 삭스 글로벌로부터 시장 점유율을 확보하며 메이시스 인크의 4분기 실적을 끌어올렸습니다. 메이시스 CEO 토니 스프링은 벤더 커뮤니티가 블루밍데일스를 전례 없이 지지하고 있다고 분석가들에게 밝혔습니다. 럭셔리 리테일 시장에서 블루밍데일스의 경쟁력이 강화되고 있음을 보여줍니다.
summary_en: Bloomingdale's gained market share from Saks Global, boosting Macy's Inc.'s Q4 performance. Macy's CEO Tony Spring told analysts that the vendor community has rallied around Bloomingdale's like never before. This demonstrates Bloomingdale's strengthening competitive position in the luxury retail market.
so_what_ko: 럭셔리 D2C 브랜드들은 벤더 파트너십과 유통업체와의 관계 강화를 통해 시장 점유율을 확대하고 브랜드 포지셔닝을 개선할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Luxury D2C brands can expand market share and improve brand positioning through strengthened vendor partnerships and retailer relationships.
key_points: Bloomingdale's gained market share from competitor Saks Global
Strong vendor community support drives performance
Luxury retail market showing competitive shifts

title: Lululemon adds Chip Bergh to board as North America revenue declines
description: The appointment is a “key acquiescence” to the demands of founder Chip Wilson, though he called the decision “underwhelming.”
summary_ko: 룰루레몬이 리바이스 CEO 칩 버그를 이사회에 영입했다고 발표했습니다. 이는 창립자 칩 윌슨의 요구에 대한 주요 양보로 보이지만, 윌슨은 이 결정을 미흡하다고 평가했습니다. 북미 지역 매출 감소 상황에서 이루어진 인사 변화입니다.
summary_en: Lululemon announced the addition of Levi's CEO Chip Bergh to its board of directors. This appointment is viewed as a key concession to founder Chip Wilson's demands, though Wilson called the decision underwhelming. The move comes amid declining North America revenue for the athletic apparel company.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 창립자와 경영진 간의 갈등이 브랜드 이미지와 매출에 직접적 영향을 미칠 수 있음을 인식해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should recognize that conflicts between founders and management can directly impact brand image and revenue performance.
key_points: Lululemon adds Levi's CEO Chip Bergh to board
Decision seen as concession to founder Chip Wilson
North America revenue experiencing decline

title: Walmart to test faster renovation process for Neighborhood Markets
description: The retailer intends to take several stores out of service for about a month for upgrades instead of doing construction in phases over a longer period.
summary_ko: 월마트가 네이버후드 마켓 매장에 대해 더 빠른 리노베이션 프로세스를 테스트할 예정입니다. 기존의 단계적 공사 방식 대신 약 한 달간 매장을 완전히 폐점하고 업그레이드를 진행하는 방식입니다. 이를 통해 리노베이션 기간을 단축하고 효율성을 높이려는 시도입니다.
summary_en: Walmart plans to test a faster renovation process for its Neighborhood Market stores. Instead of phased construction over a longer period, the retailer will take stores completely out of service for about a month for upgrades. This approach aims to reduce renovation timeframes and improve efficiency.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 매장 운영 중단을 최소화하면서도 빠른 업그레이드를 통해 고객 경험을 개선할 수 있는 혁신적인 운영 방식을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should explore innovative operational approaches that minimize store downtime while enabling rapid upgrades to enhance customer experience.
key_points: Walmart testing rapid remodel process for Neighborhood Markets
Complete store closure for one month instead of phased construction
Focus on reducing renovation timeframes and improving efficiency

title: Half of consumers prefer brands that don’t use generative AI, Gartner finds
description: Consumers who are ambivalent or distrust the technology may walk away if they feel forced to use AI, one analyst said.
summary_ko: 가트너 조사에 따르면 소비자의 절반이 생성형 AI를 사용하지 않는 브랜드를 선호한다고 나타났습니다. AI 기술에 대해 양면적이거나 불신하는 소비자들은 AI 사용을 강요받는다고 느끼면 해당 브랜드를 떠날 수 있다고 분석가들은 경고했습니다. 이는 브랜드들이 AI 도입 시 소비자 선택권을 고려해야 함을 시사합니다.
summary_en: A Gartner study revealed that half of consumers prefer brands that don't use generative AI. Analysts warn that consumers who are ambivalent or distrust AI technology may abandon brands if they feel forced to use AI. This suggests brands need to consider consumer choice when implementing AI technologies.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 기술 도입 시 소비자의 선택권을 보장하고, AI 사용에 대한 투명성과 대안 옵션을 제공해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must ensure consumer choice when implementing AI technology, providing transparency about AI use and alternative options for hesitant customers.
key_points: 50% of consumers prefer brands without generative AI
Consumers may abandon brands that force AI usage
Need for transparency and choice in AI implementation

title: Bob’s Discount Furniture posts 17% revenue gain in 2025, plots store openings
description: Fresh off its IPO, the furniture retailer represents a bright spot in an otherwise challenged home sector.
summary_ko: 밥스 디스카운트 퍼니처가 2025년에 17%의 매출 증가를 기록했다고 발표했습니다. IPO 직후의 이 가구 소매업체는 어려움을 겪고 있는 홈 섹터에서 밝은 전망을 보여주는 사례입니다. 회사는 추가적인 매장 확장을 계획하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Bob's Discount Furniture reported a 17% revenue gain in 2025. Fresh off its IPO, the furniture retailer represents a bright spot in an otherwise challenged home sector. The company is planning additional store openings as part of its expansion strategy.
so_what_ko: D2C 가구 브랜드는 경제적 어려움 속에서도 차별화된 가치 제안과 확장 전략으로 성장 기회를 창출할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C furniture brands can create growth opportunities through differentiated value propositions and expansion strategies even amid economic challenges.
key_points: Bob's Discount Furniture achieved 17% revenue growth in 2025
Strong performance following recent IPO
Plans for additional store openings despite challenging home sector

title: Court grants Perplexity temporary permission to access Amazon’s site with ‘agentic AI’
description:
A legal battle between the artificial intelligence (AI)-powered discovery platform Perplexity and Amazon spilled over to a U.S. appeals court following a judge’s order on March 9. U.S. District Judge Maxin Chesney ordered that Perplexity should not be allowed to access password-protected information on Amazon’s site. That order came in response to Amazon’s request for […]
The post Court grants Perplexity temporary permission to access Amazon’s site with ‘agentic AI’ appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 법원이 AI 기반 발견 플랫폼 퍼플렉시티에게 '에이전틱 AI'로 아마존 사이트에 임시 접근할 수 있는 권한을 부여했습니다. 이는 아마존이 퍼플렉시티의 비밀번호 보호 정보 접근을 제한해달라고 요청한 이후 벌어진 법적 분쟁의 일환입니다. 미국 항소법원에서 이 사안이 다뤄지고 있습니다.
summary_en: A court granted AI-powered discovery platform Perplexity temporary permission to access Amazon's site with 'agentic AI'. This follows a legal battle after Amazon requested restrictions on Perplexity's access to password-protected information. The case has moved to a U.S. appeals court for further consideration.
so_what_ko: D2C 플랫폼은 AI 에이전트의 데이터 접근 권한과 관련된 법적 쟁점들을 면밀히 모니터링하고 대응 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C platforms must closely monitor legal issues around AI agent data access rights and develop response strategies for similar challenges.
key_points: Court grants Perplexity temporary access to Amazon with agentic AI
Legal battle over password-protected information access
Case escalated to U.S. appeals court

title: [AINews] MiniMax 2.7: GLM-5 at 1/3 cost SOTA Open Model
description: congrats MiniMax!!
summary_ko: MiniMax가 새로운 2.7 버전을 출시하며 GLM-5 대비 1/3 비용으로 SOTA급 성능을 제공한다고 발표했습니다. 이는 오픈소스 모델 분야에서 주목할 만한 성과로 평가받고 있습니다. 비용 효율성과 성능을 동시에 개선한 혁신적인 AI 모델로 주목받고 있습니다.
summary_en: MiniMax announced the release of version 2.7, offering SOTA-level performance at one-third the cost of GLM-5. This achievement is being recognized as a notable milestone in the open-source model field. The innovative AI model is gaining attention for simultaneously improving cost efficiency and performance.
so_what_ko: 비용 효율적인 AI 모델의 등장으로 D2C 브랜드들이 고성능 AI 기술을 더 저렴하게 활용할 수 있는 기회가 확대됩니다.
so_what_en: The emergence of cost-effective AI models expands opportunities for D2C brands to leverage high-performance AI technology at lower costs.
key_points: MiniMax 2.7 offers GLM-5 performance at 1/3 the cost
Represents breakthrough in open-source AI model efficiency
Could democratize access to high-performance AI technology

title: UNFI ramps up AI, digital push across supply chain
description:
United Natural Foods Inc. (UNFI) is stepping up its use of artificial intelligence (AI) and digital services as it works to improve supply chain operations and help grocery customers run their businesses more efficiently. For the 13 weeks ending Jan. 31, UNFI reported net sales of $7.947 billion. That’s down $211 million, or 2.6%, from […]
The post UNFI ramps up AI, digital push across supply chain appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: UNFI가 공급망 운영 개선과 식료품 고객 비즈니스 효율성 향상을 위해 AI 및 디지털 서비스 활용을 대폭 확대하고 있습니다. 1월 31일 기준 13주간 순매출은 79억 4700만 달러로 전년 대비 2.6% 감소했습니다. 공급망 전반에 걸친 디지털 혁신을 통해 경쟁력 강화에 나서고 있습니다.
summary_en: UNFI is significantly expanding its use of AI and digital services to improve supply chain operations and help grocery customers run their businesses more efficiently. Net sales for the 13 weeks ending January 31 were $7.947 billion, down 2.6% year-over-year. The company is strengthening competitiveness through digital transformation across the supply chain.
so_what_ko: 대형 유통업체의 AI 도입 가속화는 D2C 브랜드들도 공급망 효율성과 고객 서비스 개선을 위한 AI 투자를 검토해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The acceleration of AI adoption by major distributors suggests D2C brands should consider AI investments for supply chain efficiency and customer service improvements.
key_points: UNFI expanding AI and digital services across supply chain
Focus on improving grocery customer business efficiency
Net sales of $7.947 billion despite 2.6% decline

title: Provi expands its enterprise platform for restaurant chains
description:
Provi has launched a new subscription tier aimed at helping national and regional restaurant chains standardize beverage purchasing, strengthen compliance and improve visibility across multi-location operations. The new offering, Enterprise Plus, expands Provi’s beverage management platform as operators contend with increasingly complex procurement environments that span multiple distributors, product assortments and regional requirements. About the […]
The post Provi expands its enterprise platform for restaurant chains appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Provi가 전국 및 지역 레스토랑 체인의 음료 구매 표준화, 컴플라이언스 강화, 다중 매장 운영 가시성 향상을 위한 새로운 구독 계층 Enterprise Plus를 출시했습니다. 이는 복잡한 조달 환경에서 다양한 유통업체와 제품 구성을 관리해야 하는 운영자들을 지원합니다. 음료 관리 플랫폼의 확장으로 체인 운영 효율성을 개선하고자 합니다.
summary_en: Provi launched Enterprise Plus, a new subscription tier to help national and regional restaurant chains standardize beverage purchasing, strengthen compliance, and improve visibility across multi-location operations. This supports operators managing complex procurement environments with multiple distributors and product assortments. The expansion of the beverage management platform aims to improve chain operational efficiency.
so_what_ko: B2B 플랫폼의 엔터프라이즈급 솔루션 확장은 D2C 브랜드들이 대형 고객 대상 전문화된 서비스를 개발할 필요성을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: The expansion of enterprise-grade solutions by B2B platforms shows the need for D2C brands to develop specialized services for large customers.
key_points: Enterprise Plus tier for restaurant chain beverage management
Focuses on standardization and compliance across locations
Addresses complex multi-distributor procurement challenges

title: Doba adds Walmart Marketplace integration for drop shipping sellers
description:
Doba, a drop shipping platform, announced March 18 a verified technical integration with Walmart Marketplace, allowing sellers to connect their stores and automate core ecommerce functions. The integration enables merchants to synchronize product listings, update inventory in real time and process orders automatically within the Walmart Marketplace. Doba said the connection uses OAuth 2.0 authentication […]
The post Doba adds Walmart Marketplace integration for drop shipping sellers appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 드롭시핑 플랫폼 Doba가 3월 18일 월마트 마켓플레이스와의 검증된 기술 통합을 발표했습니다. 이를 통해 판매자들은 스토어를 연결하고 핵심 이커머스 기능을 자동화할 수 있습니다. OAuth 2.0 인증을 사용하여 제품 목록 동기화, 실시간 재고 업데이트, 주문 자동 처리가 가능합니다.
summary_en: Drop shipping platform Doba announced a verified technical integration with Walmart Marketplace on March 18. This allows sellers to connect their stores and automate core ecommerce functions. Using OAuth 2.0 authentication, it enables product listing synchronization, real-time inventory updates, and automatic order processing.
so_what_ko: 주요 마켓플레이스와의 자동화 통합 솔루션은 D2C 브랜드들이 멀티 채널 판매를 효율적으로 관리할 수 있는 기회를 제공합니다.
so_what_en: Automated integration solutions with major marketplaces provide opportunities for D2C brands to efficiently manage multi-channel sales.
key_points: Verified Walmart Marketplace integration for drop shipping
Automates product listings and inventory management
Uses OAuth 2.0 authentication for secure connection

title: Scaling B2B E-commerce in 2026 Starts with the Right LMS Software
description:
Sponsor content is created on behalf of and in collaboration with TalentLMS by DigitalCommerce360. Our editorial staff is not involved in the creation of the sponsored content. In 2026, B2B e-commerce will be characterized by speed, digital infrastructure and more complicated buyer journeys. Business is no longer limited to traditional wholesale relationships; it is now […]
The post Scaling B2B E-commerce in 2026 Starts with the Right LMS Software appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 2026년 B2B 이커머스 확장은 속도, 디지털 인프라, 복잡한 구매 여정이 특징이 될 것입니다. 비즈니스는 더 이상 전통적인 도매 관계에 국한되지 않습니다. 올바른 LMS 소프트웨어 선택이 B2B 이커머스 스케일링의 핵심 요소로 제시되고 있습니다.
summary_en: B2B e-commerce scaling in 2026 will be characterized by speed, digital infrastructure, and more complicated buyer journeys. Business is no longer limited to traditional wholesale relationships. Selecting the right LMS software is presented as a key factor for B2B e-commerce scaling.
so_what_ko: 복잡해지는 B2B 구매 여정에 대응하기 위해 D2C 브랜드들은 교육 및 온보딩 시스템 강화를 통해 고객 경험을 개선해야 합니다.
so_what_en: To respond to increasingly complex B2B buyer journeys, D2C brands must improve customer experience by strengthening education and onboarding systems.
key_points: 2026 B2B e-commerce focuses on speed and digital infrastructure
Buyer journeys becoming more complicated
LMS software crucial for B2B scaling success

title: David Sacks’ big Iran warning gets big time ignored
description:
Sec. Scott Bessent, President Donald Trump, and David Sacks during The White House Digital Assets Summit in Washington, DC, on Friday, March 7, 2025. | Chris Kleponis/CNP/Bloomberg via Getty Images	

Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the politics of technology and the technology of politics - now landing in your inbox on Wednesdays! If someone has forwarded this email to you, and you're not a Verge subscriber yet, you should sign up right here, and not just because it would be really, really cool if you do that. We can apparently see how many non-subscribers have opened this email, and why should Palantir get all the "spying on people" fun?
Do you have cool events to highlight, tips to toss over, and secrets to spill? Send everything to tina.nguyen+tips@theverge.com. Or, if you're truly tech-pilled …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: David Sacks가 이란 관련 경고를 발표했으나 큰 주목을 받지 못했다고 The Verge가 보도했습니다. 이는 기술 정치와 정치 기술에 관한 뉴스레터의 일부로 다뤄졌습니다. 구체적인 경고 내용이나 배경은 원문에서 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: David Sacks issued a warning about Iran that received little attention according to The Verge. This was covered as part of a newsletter about technology politics and political technology. The specific content or background of the warning is not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: 정치적 기술 규제 동향을 모니터링하여 D2C 비즈니스에 미칠 수 있는 정책 변화를 대비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C businesses should monitor political technology regulatory trends to prepare for potential policy changes.
key_points: David Sacks issued Iran-related warning
Warning received limited attention
Part of technology politics newsletter coverage

title: ChatGPT did not cure a dog’s cancer
description:
When an Australian tech entrepreneur with no background in biology or medicine said ChatGPT helped save his dog from cancer, the story spread with the kind of validation Big Tech has long craved: proof that AI will revolutionize medicine and take on one of its deadliest diseases. The reality, as usual, is more complicated.
The version of the story that made the rounds online, first reported by The Australian, was relatively straightforward. In 2024, Sydney-based Paul Conyngham learned that his dog Rosie had cancer. Chemotherapy slowed the disease but failed to shrink the tumors. After vets said "nothing could be done" for the Staffordshire  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 호주 기업가가 ChatGPT가 자신의 개 암 치료에 도움을 줬다고 주장한 이야기가 온라인에서 확산되었습니다. 하지만 실제로는 AI가 의학적 치료를 제공한 것이 아니라 더 복잡한 상황이었다고 The Verge가 분석했습니다. 이는 AI의 의료 분야 혁신에 대한 과장된 기대를 보여주는 사례입니다.
summary_en: An Australian entrepreneur's claim that ChatGPT helped cure his dog's cancer spread online, but The Verge revealed the reality was more complicated. The story exemplifies the kind of validation Big Tech seeks for AI revolutionizing medicine. However, AI did not actually provide medical treatment as claimed.
so_what_ko: AI 마케팅에서 과장된 효능 주장은 역효과를 낳을 수 있으므로, D2C 브랜드는 AI 기능을 현실적이고 검증 가능한 방식으로 소통해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must communicate AI capabilities realistically and verifiably, as exaggerated claims can backfire in AI marketing.
key_points: ChatGPT cancer cure story was misleading
Big Tech seeks medical AI validation
Reality more complicated than viral claims
AI medical applications need careful verification

title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
description:
Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not been a good one, no matter how much Nvidia insists that this pursuit of photorealism is still honoring the original artists’ intent.
Follow along below for all the latest updates about Nvidia’s DLSS 5 upgrades.
Nvidia has lost the plot with gamers
			
Jensen Huang, on the critical reaction to DLSS 5: “Well, first of all, they’re completely wrong.”
			
Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse
			
DLSS 5 looks like a real-time generative AI filter for video games
			
Nvidia just announced DLSS 5 and Digital Foundry already has a video.
summary_ko: Nvidia가 실시간으로 게임의 조명과 재질을 변경할 수 있는 DLSS 5라는 새로운 AI 그래픽 기술을 발표했습니다. 하지만 많은 게이머들이 이 기술에 대해 부정적인 반응을 보이고 있으며, 캐릭터가 과도하게 보정된다는 비판이 제기되고 있습니다. Jensen Huang CEO는 이러한 비판이 완전히 틀렸다고 반박했습니다.
summary_en: Nvidia announced DLSS 5, a new AI graphics technology that can change game lighting and materials in real-time. However, many gamers have reacted negatively, criticizing it for over-processing characters. CEO Jensen Huang dismissed these criticisms as completely wrong.
so_what_ko: 소비자의 실제 선호도와 기술 발전 방향이 다를 수 있으므로, D2C 브랜드는 AI 기술 도입 시 사용자 피드백을 적극 수집하고 반영해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should actively collect and incorporate user feedback when implementing AI technology, as consumer preferences may differ from technological advancement directions.
key_points: DLSS 5 enables real-time lighting and material changes
Gamer backlash against AI-enhanced graphics
CEO defends technology against criticism
Gap between technical capability and user acceptance

title: Patreon CEO calls AI companies’ fair use argument ‘bogus,’ says creators should be paid
description: Patreon CEO Jack Conte says AI companies should pay creators for training data, arguing their fair use defense falls apart when they license content from major publishers.
summary_ko: Patreon CEO Jack Conte는 AI 회사들의 공정 이용 주장이 허위라며 창작자들에게 훈련 데이터 사용료를 지불해야 한다고 주장했습니다. 그는 AI 회사들이 주요 출판사들과는 라이선스 계약을 맺으면서 개별 창작자들에게는 공정 이용을 주장하는 것이 모순이라고 지적했습니다. 이는 AI 훈련 데이터에 대한 창작자 권익 보호 논의의 핵심 쟁점입니다.
summary_en: Patreon CEO Jack Conte argued that AI companies' fair use defense is bogus and creators should be paid for training data. He pointed out the contradiction of AI companies licensing content from major publishers while claiming fair use for individual creators. This addresses core issues in creator rights protection regarding AI training data.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 도구 사용 시 창작자 권익을 존중하는 정책을 수립하고, 콘텐츠 제작자들과의 공정한 파트너십을 구축해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should establish policies that respect creator rights when using AI tools and build fair partnerships with content creators.
key_points: AI companies should pay creators for training data
Fair use argument contradicted by publisher licensing deals
Creator rights protection in AI era
Double standard in AI company practices

title: 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context
description:
AI bias often starts before the model runs. Missing context, flawed prompts and assumptions distort outputs. Here's how to correct them.
The post 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: AI의 편향성은 모델이 실행되기 전부터 시작되며, 맥락 부족, 잘못된 프롬프트, 가정 오류가 결과를 왜곡시킵니다. MarTech.org는 더 나은 맥락 제공을 통해 AI 편향성을 줄이는 3가지 방법을 제시했습니다. 이는 마케팅에서 AI를 활용할 때 중요한 고려사항입니다.
summary_en: AI bias often begins before models run, with missing context, flawed prompts and assumptions distorting outputs. MarTech.org presented three ways to reduce AI bias through better context provision. This is crucial for marketing AI implementation.
so_what_ko: D2C 마케팅에서 AI를 사용할 때는 충분한 맥락 정보를 제공하고 프롬프트를 정교하게 설계하여 편향된 결과를 방지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C marketing must provide sufficient context and carefully design prompts when using AI to prevent biased outcomes.
key_points: AI bias starts before model execution
Missing context and flawed prompts cause distortion
Three methods to reduce bias through better context
Critical consideration for marketing AI

title: Marketo deprecates SEO feature in latest release notes
description:
The February 2026 Marketo Engage release notes cover sunsetting the SEO tool and new AI-powered content features for Email Designer. 
The post Marketo deprecates SEO feature in latest release notes appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 마케토가 2026년 2월 릴리스에서 SEO 기능을 단종한다고 발표했습니다. 동시에 이메일 디자이너에 AI 기반 콘텐츠 기능을 새로 추가했습니다. 마케팅 자동화 플랫폼의 기능 재편이 진행되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Marketo announced the deprecation of its SEO feature in the February 2026 release notes. The platform is simultaneously introducing new AI-powered content features for Email Designer. Marketing automation platforms are undergoing feature restructuring.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 마케토 SEO 기능 단종에 대비해 대체 SEO 도구를 준비해야 하며, 새로운 AI 콘텐츠 기능을 활용한 이메일 마케팅 고도화를 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare alternative SEO tools for Marketo's deprecation and explore the new AI content features to enhance email marketing capabilities.
key_points: Marketo deprecates SEO feature in February 2026 release
New AI-powered content features added to Email Designer
Marketing automation platform feature restructuring ongoing

title: The age of the AI shopping agent isn’t here… yet
description:
Grant Deken from Klaviyo discusses how AI is changing the way consumers shop. But will it ever change how they make a purchase? Most likely, yes. 
The post The age of the AI shopping agent isn’t here… yet appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 클라비오의 Grant Deken이 AI가 소비자 쇼핑 방식을 변화시키고 있다고 언급했습니다. AI 쇼핑 에이전트 시대는 아직 도래하지 않았지만 구매 방식 변화는 예상된다고 전망했습니다. 소비자 행동의 근본적 변화가 진행 중입니다.
summary_en: Grant Deken from Klaviyo discusses how AI is changing consumer shopping behavior. The age of AI shopping agents hasn't arrived yet, but changes in purchase behavior are expected. Fundamental shifts in consumer behavior are underway.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 도입을 위한 준비를 시작하되, 현재는 기존 고객 여정 최적화에 집중해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should begin preparing for AI shopping agent integration while currently focusing on optimizing existing customer journeys.
key_points: AI is changing consumer shopping patterns
AI shopping agent era not yet arrived
Purchase behavior transformation expected
Klaviyo insights on AI commerce evolution

title: The real GTM advantage is owning language and signal
description:
Most deals are decided before the funnel starts, and marketers who don’t own buyer language and signal are losing before they even start.
The post The real GTM advantage is owning language and signal appeared first on MarTech.
summary_ko: 대부분의 거래는 퍼널이 시작되기 전에 결정된다고 분석되었습니다. 구매자 언어와 시그널을 소유하지 못한 마케터들은 시작 전부터 패배한다고 지적했습니다. GTM 전략에서 언어와 시그널 소유권이 핵심 경쟁우위로 부상했습니다.
summary_en: Most deals are decided before the funnel starts according to the analysis. Marketers who don't own buyer language and signals are losing before they begin. Owning language and signals has emerged as a key competitive advantage in GTM strategy.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 고객 언어와 구매 시그널을 선제적으로 파악하고 소유해야 하며, 퍼널 이전 단계의 고객 접점을 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must proactively identify and own customer language and purchase signals, strengthening pre-funnel customer touchpoints.
key_points: Deals decided before funnel initiation
Buyer language ownership critical for success
Signal control provides competitive advantage
Pre-funnel strategy importance highlighted

title: 14 Things I Learned at SXSW
description: The festival, despite its breadth, still managed to coalesce around a few themes.
summary_ko: SXSW 2026에서 학습한 14가지 인사이트가 공유되었습니다. 페스티벌의 광범위한 주제에도 불구하고 몇 가지 핵심 테마로 수렴되었습니다. 마케팅 및 기술 트렌드의 주요 방향성이 제시되었습니다.
summary_en: 14 key insights from SXSW 2026 were shared in the analysis. Despite the festival's broad scope, themes coalesced around several key areas. Major directions in marketing and technology trends were presented.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 SXSW에서 도출된 핵심 테마들을 분석하여 향후 마케팅 전략과 기술 도입 계획에 반영해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies should analyze key SXSW themes to inform future marketing strategies and technology adoption plans.
key_points: 14 insights shared from SXSW 2026
Multiple themes converged into key areas
Marketing and tech trend directions identified

title: EXCLUSIVE: SXSW 2026 Sees 20% Boost in Music Attendance Despite Shorter Schedule
description: The Austin, Texas-based festival expects overall attendance to stay flat with 2025.
summary_ko: SXSW 2026이 더 짧은 일정에도 불구하고 음악 부문 참석률이 20% 증가했습니다. 오스틴에서 열린 이 페스티벌의 전체 참석률은 2025년과 비슷한 수준을 유지할 것으로 예상됩니다. 페스티벌 운영 효율성이 개선되었습니다.
summary_en: SXSW 2026 achieved a 20% boost in music attendance despite a shorter schedule. The Austin-based festival expects overall attendance to remain flat compared to 2025. Festival operational efficiency has improved.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 SXSW의 효율적 운영 모델을 참고하여 이벤트 마케팅 최적화와 고객 참여도 향상 전략을 수립할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can reference SXSW's efficient operational model to optimize event marketing and develop customer engagement enhancement strategies.
key_points: 20% increase in music attendance
Shorter festival schedule maintained engagement
Overall attendance flat versus 2025
Improved operational efficiency demonstrated
